description: Lightweight Pack Runtime SDK for installed/enabled pack registry access, pack installation lifecycle, rollback, and frontend shell synchronization without importing the full platform client.
principles: Expose Pack Runtime as the stable integration surface for external frontends, plugins, CLIs, sidecars, and automation scripts.
Keep optional capabilities discoverable through the backend pack registry instead of hard-coding every feature into the main system.
Let frontend shells synchronize menus, routes, UI resources, and SDK entrypoints from enabled packs while preserving enable, disable, and rollback controls.
Expose a read-only backend route audit so release gates can compare manifest routeSpecs with mounted Gateway modules before shipping a pack.
Expose a manifest-derived capability index so runtime skill gates and external shells can resolve capabilities to pack ids, status, routes, permissions, frontend paths, and SDK imports.

capabilities.name: list
capabilities.description: Read installed packs with enabled-pack summary for operator consoles.

capabilities.name: catalog
capabilities.description: Read installable Pack catalog entries from configured manifest sources, aligned with installed/enabled state and distribution metadata.

capabilities.name: installed
capabilities.description: Read the local installed pack registry.

capabilities.name: enabled
capabilities.description: Read enabled packs that should contribute frontend menus, routes, UI assets, and SDK entrypoints.

capabilities.name: capabilities
capabilities.description: Read the manifest-derived capability index across installed packs, including pack status, routes, permissions, frontend paths, and TypeScript SDK imports.

capabilities.name: resolveCapability
capabilities.description: Resolve one capability to installed provider packs, the preferred enabled pack when available, and the next operator action: use, enable, or install.

capabilities.name: gateCapability
capabilities.description: Preflight one capability before runtime use by combining capability resolution with enabled-pack backend route audit evidence.

capabilities.name: planCapabilities
capabilities.description: Plan a workflow's required capabilities in one read-only preflight, grouping usable packs, packs to enable, missing capabilities to install, and backend route audit blockers.

capabilities.name: prepareCapabilities
capabilities.description: Convert workflow capability preflight into a user-selectable incremental package checklist with use, enable, install, download, checksum, and route-audit repair steps.

capabilities.name: backendModules
capabilities.description: Inspect backend pack modules and routes mounted in the host Gateway.

capabilities.name: backendRouteAudit
capabilities.description: Compare manifest-declared backend routeSpecs with mounted Gateway backend modules and report missing, mismatched, or undeclared routes.

capabilities.name: install
capabilities.description: Install a pack from a local manifest path or manifest URL.

capabilities.name: enable
capabilities.description: Enable an installed pack and make its backend/frontend capabilities active.

capabilities.name: disable
capabilities.description: Disable an installed pack without deleting it from the local registry.

capabilities.name: rollback
capabilities.description: Rollback an installed pack to its previous version metadata when available.

capabilities.name: prune
capabilities.description: Prune cached pack artifacts that are no longer referenced by current or rollback versions.

capabilities.name: frontendSync
capabilities.description: Build frontend shell menus, routes, route bindings, backend route bindings, UI resource descriptors, distributions, and SDK entrypoints from enabled pack manifests.

capabilities.name: routeBinding
capabilities.description: Resolve one synchronized frontend route to its owning pack, component, UI assets, distribution metadata, and SDK entrypoints.
